nasb.text: but you know that it was because of a bodily illness that I preached the gospel to you the first time;

esv.text: You know it was because of a bodily ailment that I preached the gospel to you at first,

cnv.text: 你們知道，我第一次傳福音給你們，是因為身體有病。

ccb.text: 你们知道，当初是因为我生病才有机会首次向你们传福音。

csbs.text: 你们知道，我原先传福音给你们，是身体有病的时候。
